mapper.select:
select p.id, p.pet_id, p.user_id, cast(p.images as char) as images, p.description, p.location, p.shoot_time, p.status, p.is_daily_winner, p.reject_reason, p.created_at, pet.name as pet_name, u.nickname as uploader_name from photos p left join pets pet on pet.id = p.pet_id left join users u on u.id = p.user_id
p.deleted_at is null
and p.status = #{status}
and ( p.description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.location like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or pet.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by p.created_at desc
mapper.update: update photos set status = #{status}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = sysdate(), reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = sysdate() where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
